title: One Dot Digital marketing agency website with scroll animations

requirements.summary: Build a responsive multi-section marketing site with top navigation, anchored scroll-to sections, and a footer repeating navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: A visitor can access Home, About Us, Services, Testimonials, and Contact Us content via navigation (either separate routes or a single-page with anchored sections).
Layout is responsive and readable on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
Navigation includes clear CTAs (e.g., “Contact”/“Get in touch”) that brings the user to the Contact section/page.
Footer contains navigation links to the same main sections.

file_operations.description: Create the main single-page layout with anchored sections (Home/About/Services/Testimonials/Contact), render the top navigation and footer, and wire in the section components so all content is reachable without additional routes.

Implement a responsive top navigation with links that scroll/jump to each section and include a primary CTA to Contact. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Button) for consistent styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Implement a footer that repeats the main navigation links and supports the Contact details area. Use shadcn-ui components where helpful (e.g., Separator/Button variants); verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add a small utility to perform accessible anchored scrolling (including optional offset for sticky nav) that is reused by header/footer navigation.

requirements.summary: Apply a cohesive One Dot Digital visual theme (colors/typography/spacing) using the uploaded brand image as the primary mark and complementary accents (avoid generic blue+purple gradient default).
acceptanceCriteria: A single, consistent theme is applied across the entire site (buttons, headings, cards, sections).
The uploaded brand image is used as the brand mark in the header and elsewhere per requirements.
Typography hierarchy is clear (H1/H2/body) and consistent across sections.
The theme does not rely on a generic blue+purple gradient as the primary brand look unless it clearly aligns with the uploaded logo styling.

file_operations.description: Create the site’s global Tailwind entry CSS (matching the existing template stack) and define consistent base typography and section spacing tokens/classes used throughout the site.
Extend theme tokens (colors, shadows, typography/spacing utilities) to match a cohesive One Dot Digital look aligned with the uploaded logo styling, avoiding a generic default gradient look.

Create a reusable section wrapper for consistent headings, spacing, and max-width layout across sections. Use shadcn-ui primitives where appropriate (e.g., Separator) for consistent styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Use the uploaded “Add a heading.jpeg” as the logo in the header and as a prominent hero visual with crisp rendering on retina screens.
acceptanceCriteria: Header displays the uploaded logo/brand image and it links back to Home/top of page.
Homepage hero prominently features the uploaded logo/brand image in a visually balanced way.
Logo displays without pixelation on common device widths (mobile and desktop).

file_operations.description: Add the uploaded logo image as a static public asset for use in the header and hero.

Implement the homepage hero area featuring the logo prominently (with correct sizing and responsive image attributes) and a primary CTA that scrolls to Contact. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Button) for CTA styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Render the logo image in the header as the brand mark and make it link to the top/Home section. Use shadcn-ui components for layout/CTA consistency; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add mixed scroll-based animations (reveal, subtle parallax, service interactions) with reduced-motion support and smooth performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Home/About sections animate into view on scroll (e.g., fade/slide reveal).
At least one subtle parallax-like effect is present on scroll (e.g., background/hero element moves slightly).
Services cards have interaction feedback (hover/focus) and at least one scroll-triggered animation pattern for the Services section.
Animations respect user reduced-motion preferences (reduced motion disables or minimizes animations).
No noticeable jank on scroll on a typical laptop/mobile device.

file_operations.description: Add a hook to detect reduced-motion preference and expose a boolean to gate animation behavior across the site.
Add an IntersectionObserver-based hook for scroll reveal (fade/slide) that respects reduced-motion and supports staggered reveals.
Add a lightweight parallax hook for subtle scroll-based transforms (gated by reduced-motion) optimized to avoid scroll jank.
Implement About section reveal animations on scroll using the reveal hook while keeping motion tasteful and performant.

Implement Services section with scroll-triggered reveal patterns and card hover/focus interactions; use shadcn-ui card-like components if available for consistent styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add a subtle parallax-like movement to a hero background/graphic element using the parallax hook, respecting reduced-motion.
Add global motion-safe/motion-reduce class patterns and reusable animation utility classes (or Tailwind-based classes) used by reveal and hover interactions.

requirements.summary: Implement the About Us section with the provided “Who Are We?” copy in a polished, visually distinct layout.
acceptanceCriteria: The About Us section/page includes the “Who Are We?” heading and the provided paragraph copy.
Copy is presented without typos introduced by implementation.
About content is visually distinct from other sections (spacing/background/layout).

file_operations.description: Add the exact “Who Are We?” heading and provided paragraph copy, presented in a split/polished layout with distinct section styling.

Support About-specific layout variants (e.g., split layout) and consistent heading hierarchy. Use shadcn-ui primitives where appropriate; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement the Services section with all 7 services and their exact descriptions and “Includes” sublists in a responsive card/grid layout.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 services are present: Performance Marketing, SEO Services, Social Media Marketing (SMM), Website Development, Graphic Designing, Branding & Awareness, Content Writing.
Each service shows its description and an “Includes” list with the provided items.
Services are presented in a responsive grid/cards layout (1 column on mobile, multiple on larger screens).
Each service card has a clear title and readable body text.

file_operations.description: Add a typed, static data source containing all 7 services with exact names, descriptions, and “Includes” lists (static content only; no CMS).

Render the 7 services from the static content file in a responsive grid of cards with clear titles, descriptions, and Includes lists. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card/Badge/Button variants) for consistent styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a small component that maps each service to an icon from the provided local sprite asset for consistent service-card visuals.

requirements.summary: Implement a responsive Testimonials section showing all provided testimonials with name and business/descriptor in a carousel or grid.
acceptanceCriteria: All provided testimonials appear on the site with the quoted text preserved.
Each testimonial clearly shows the author name and the associated business/descriptor.
Testimonials layout is responsive and maintains consistent spacing/typography.

file_operations.description: Add a typed, static testimonials data source preserving the provided testimonial text, author names, and associated business/descriptors.

Render testimonials in a responsive carousel or grid with consistent formatting and readable typography. Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card/Button) for consistent UI controls; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the Testimonials section into the page flow and ensure navigation can scroll to it.

requirements.summary: Implement Contact section and footer contact details with clickable mailto/tel and Instagram link opening in a new tab using the exact provided details.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact section/page displays: padwanishivani@gmail.com, 8097445826, and the exact Instagram URL provided.
Footer repeats the same contact details.
Email link opens the default email client (mailto).
Phone number link initiates calling on supported devices (tel).
Instagram link opens in a new tab and is clearly labeled as Instagram.

file_operations.description: Add a single source of truth for the exact contact details (email, phone, Instagram URL) to prevent accidental modifications.

Create the Contact section displaying email/phone/Instagram with correct clickable actions (mailto, tel, external link in new tab). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Button) for consistent link styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Repeat the same contact details in the footer with mailto/tel and Instagram external link behavior. Use shadcn-ui components where helpful; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the Contact section into the page flow and ensure header/footer CTAs scroll to it.

requirements.summary: Add additional marketing-themed imagery beyond the logo using locally stored static assets and integrate them into hero/sections without harming readability.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one additional visual asset (beyond the logo) is used in the hero and/or section dividers/backgrounds.
All added images are shipped as static assets from the frontend (no backend routes for images).
Images match the chosen theme and do not reduce text readability (sufficient contrast).

file_operations.description: Add the generated abstract digital marketing hero background static asset for use in the hero.
Add the generated services icons sprite static asset for use in service cards.
Add the generated section divider/shape static asset for use between sections.
Integrate the static hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png in a way that maintains text contrast/readability and supports parallax when enabled.
Create a reusable section divider component that uses frontend/public/assets/generated/section-shapes.dim_1600x400.png to support visual transitions between sections.
Use the sprite at frontend/public/assets/generated/services-icons-sprite.dim_1024x1024.png via the ServiceIcon component to add consistent marketing-themed visuals to each service card.

requirements.summary: Add professional on-page polish: consistent headings, clear primary hero CTA to Contact, and a static no-auth experience.
acceptanceCriteria: Each main section has a clear heading and consistent spacing.
A primary CTA (e.g., “Get in touch”) is visible in the hero and navigates to the Contact section/page.
No authentication UI is exposed (no sign-in buttons/flows).

file_operations.description: Ensure each section has a consistent heading hierarchy and spacing, and that the experience is fully static content (no sign-in buttons/flows surfaced in the UI).

Add/confirm a prominent primary CTA (e.g., “Get in touch”) that scrolls to the Contact section. Use shadcn-ui Button for consistent CTA styling; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Standardize section headings and spacing rules so all sections feel cohesive. Use shadcn-ui typography-friendly styling patterns if applicable; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
